title: EQ - Select a value, close the Settings screen, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: Verify that the selected EQ value persists after closing and reopening the Settings screen for all possible values.
steps: Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
Check the currently selected EQ value.
expected: The EQ value selected before closing the Settings screen should still be selected after reopening it. This should hold true for all possible EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
